metodos.codigoOriginal:
Parameters pcCursor, pcNivAnt, pcCurDest

Local lnOldSel, lcXML

lnOldSel = Select()
lcXML = []

If Used([CrAux])
	Use in CrAux
EndIf 

Select &pcCursor.
Select cidchaves, Cods, Descs, 0 as Marcas, Space(4) as Codigo From &pcCursor. Where 1=0 Into Cursor CrAux ReadWrite

Select &pcCursor.	
Go top

Scan 			
	lcXML = Nvl(&pcCursor..Nivel,[])
	Zap in CrAux
	If Not Empty(lcXML)
		= fXmlToCursor(lcXML, [CrAux], .f.)
		Select CrAux
		Scan For CrAux.Marcas <> 0
			Select &pcCurDest.
			Append Blank 
		... [TRUNCADO]

Local lnTip

lnTip = ThisForm.optSinAna.Value

Do Case
	Case (lnTip = 1)
		Report Form SigReEt1 To Print Prompt NoConsole
	Case (lnTip = 2)
		Report Form SigReEt2 To Print Prompt NoConsole
	Case (lnTip = 3) and this.Opt_Subt.Value = 0
		Report Form SigReEt3 To Print Prompt NoConsole
	Case (lnTip = 3) and this.Opt_Subt.Value = 1
		Report Form SigReEt5 To Print Prompt NoConsole
	Case (lnTip = 4)
		Report Form SigReEt4 To Print Prompt NoConsole
	Case (lnTip = 5)
		Report Form SigReEt6 To Print Prom... [TRUNCADO]

=fConfigGeral()

=DoDefault()

ThisForm.podataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector',thisform.Name)

lnQueryOk = ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute([Select cemps,razas From SigCdEmp Where cemps = ']+_Empr+[' ],'CrSigCdEmp')
If lnQueryOk < 1
	MessageBox('Favor reinicializar o processo.',16,'Falha na Conexăo')
	Return(.F.)
EndIf

Select CrSigCdEmp
Go Top
If !Eof()
	ThisForm.getEmpresa.Value  = CrSigCdEmp.cemps
	ThisForm.getDEmpresa.Value = CrSigCdEmp.razas
EndIf

lnQueryOk = ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute([S... [TRUNCADO]

lcDEp  = Thisform.getDEmpresa.Value
lcGru  = Thisform.getGrupo.Value

lnOrdem = ThisForm.Op... [TRUNCADO]

ThisForm.poDataMgr.Release
DoDefault()

Local lnTip

lnTip = ThisForm.optSinAna.Value

Do Case
	Case (lnTip = 1)
		Report Form SigReEt1 Preview NoConsole
	Case (lnTip = 2)
		Report Form SigReEt2 Preview NoConsole
	Case (lnTip = 3) and this.Opt_Subt.Value = 0
		Report Form SigReEt3 Preview NoConsole
	Case (lnTip = 3) and this.Opt_Subt.Value = 1
		Report Form SigReEt5 Preview NoConsole
	Case (lnTip = 4)
		Report Form SigReEt4 Preview NoConsole
	Case (lnTip = 5)
		Report Form SigReEt6 Preview NoConsole
	Case (lnTip = 6)
		Report Form Sig... [TRUNCADO]

If This.Value # 4 && Se năo clicou em saída
	If IsEmpty(ThisForm.getEmpresa.Value)
		Messagebox('Empresa Inválida !!!',0+48,'')
		ThisForm.getEmpresa.SetFocus

	EndIf
	If IsEmpty(ThisForm.getGrupo.Value)

Local loBrow, lcNivel

lcNivel = Alltrim(ThisForm.getNvl3.Value)

If !IsEmpty(This.Value)
	Select * From CrSigLcNv4 Where Cods = lcNivel Into Cursor LocalNivel Readwrite
	Select LocalNivel
	Index On Codigo Tag Codigo
	Set Near On
	If !Seek(This.Value)
		loBrow = Createobject( 'fwbuscasel', 'LocalNivel', 'Codigo', This.Value, 'Seleçăo' )
		loBrow.AddColuna( 'Codigo','', 'Código'  , .T., 'Codigo' )
		loBrow.AddColuna( 'Descs', '', 'Descrçăo', .F. )
		loBrow.Show
		This.Value = LocalNivel.Codigo

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Select cidchaves, Cods, Descs, 0 as Marcas, Space(4) as Codigo From &pcCursor. Where 1=0 Into Cursor CrAux ReadWrite
